'''jasata''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:deacylation|deacylation]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-s-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:deacylation|deacylation]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| jasata
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæsætæth|jæsætæth]] || [[word:jæsætæj|jæsætæj]] || [[word:jæsætæsh|jæsætæsh]] || [[word:jæsætæ|jæsætæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jasasatath|jasasatath]] || [[word:jasasataj|jasasataj]] || [[word:jasasatash|jasasatash]] || [[word:jasasata|jasasata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jasatath|jasatath]] || [[word:jasataj|jasataj]] || [[word:jasatash|jasatash]] || [[word:jasata|jasata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jasaftath|jasaftath]] || [[word:jasaftaj|jasaftaj]] || [[word:jasaftash|jasaftash]] || [[word:jasaftaf|jasaftaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jasatatha|jasatatha]] || [[word:jasataja|jasataja]] || [[word:jasatasha|jasatasha]] || [[word:jasataka|jasataka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jasatath|jasatath]] || [[word:jasataj|jasataj]] || [[word:jasatash|jasatash]] || [[word:jasata|jasata]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jasatathal|jasatathal]] || [[word:jasatajal|jasatajal]] || [[word:jasatashal|jasatashal]] || [[word:jasatakal|jasatakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jasatathatha|jasatathatha]] || [[word:jasatajaja|jasatajaja]] || [[word:jasatashasha|jasatashasha]] || [[word:jasataka|jasataka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jasatathan|jasatathan]] || [[word:jasatajan|jasatajan]] || [[word:jasatashan|jasatashan]] || [[word:jasatakan|jasatakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jasatathaoro|jasatathaoro]] || [[word:jasatajaoro|jasatajaoro]] || [[word:jasatashaoro|jasatashaoro]] || [[word:jasatakaoro|jasatakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
